docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ENVELOPE STAMPED, "RETURN TO SENDER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD" COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOWERY, JEREMIAH
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT LOWERY, JEREMIAH

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN--VP TOWING &QA AND GEN NASHIMOTO--QUALITY ASSURANCE DEPT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT LOWERY, JEREMIAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-03-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
